figures.caption: Fig. 1: Strong (left) and weak (right) scaling of GALÆXI on Hunter. The ideal speedup and parallel efficiency are indicated by the black dotted lines.
Table 1: Comparison of the performance of GALÆXI with the three available compute partitioning modes (SPX, TPX and CPX) for the AMD MI300A APUs.
Fig. 2: Top: Comparison of instantaneous, streamwise body force FBF,x. Bottom: Normalized relative error ε of the GPU implementation with respect to the CPUbased reference.
Fig. 3: Shock wave formation for a static pressure ratio (Case 2; left) and increased back pressure (right). The instantaneous flow field coloured by Mach number at t/CTU = 50 is shown.
